pages.text: Any non-player mob can drop blood when it dies, including mobs from other mods. The amount is based on max health divided by 10.
$(br)Blood Demon Method unlocks the blood bar. Right-click blood to refine 1 point into the bar, up to 10 times max qi.$(br2)Blood can pay spell and technique costs when qi is not enough.

$(br)Blood Demon Method has three versions: Golden Core Late, Nascent Soul Late, and Soul Transformation Late.$(br2)When breakthrough progress is incomplete, stored blood is automatically consumed. Every 10 blood adds 1 progress.
